summary: Iteration 24 - Geolocation 'Voir les biens autour de moi' Feature Testing Complete. All requested features tested and working correctly. Backend API returns properties sorted by distance with distance_km field. Frontend MapPage shows geolocation button, radius selector (1/5/10/20 km), user position marker (blue dot), radius circle, and nearby property cards with distance. ImmobilierPage 'Autour de moi' button links correctly to /immobilier/carte?nearby=1.

backend_api: GET /api/properties/nearby?lat=9.555&lng=-13.650&radius_km=10 - Returns 6 properties sorted by distance with distance_km field
GET /api/properties/nearby?lat=9.555&lng=-13.650&radius_km=1 - Returns 1 property (fewer results for smaller radius)
GET /api/properties/nearby without lat/lng - Returns 422 validation error (correctly validates required params)
GET /api/properties/nearby default radius_km=5 when not specified
GET /api/properties/nearby - Response includes price_converted for GNF properties
GET /api/properties/map/markers - Returns map markers for regular mode
frontend_ui: ImmobilierPage: 'AUTOUR DE MOI' button visible with Navigation icon
ImmobilierPage: 'Autour de moi' button href correctly links to /immobilier/carte?nearby=1
MapPage: 'VOIR LES BIENS AUTOUR DE MOI' button visible in geolocation bar
MapPage: FILTRES button toggles filter panel with Type/Ville/Quartier/Status/Prix filters
MapPage: Clicking geolocation button activates nearby mode
MapPage: Radius selector buttons (1 KM, 5 KM, 10 KM, 20 KM) appear in nearby mode
MapPage: User position shown as blue dot marker on map
MapPage: Blue dashed radius circle displayed around user position
MapPage: Legend updated to show 'VOUS' in nearby mode
MapPage: Title changes to 'BIENS AUTOUR DE VOUS' in nearby mode
MapPage: 'QUITTER' (exit) button visible in nearby mode
MapPage: Exit nearby mode returns to regular 'CARTE DES ANNONCES' view
MapPage: Nearby results section appears below map with property cards showing distance (e.g., 4.57 km)
MapPage: ?nearby=1 query param auto-triggers geolocation on page load
MapPage: Geolocation error message displayed when permission denied
mobile_responsive: MapPage: All UI elements visible on 390px mobile viewport
MapPage: Geolocate button visible on mobile
MapPage: Filter panel works on mobile
MapPage: Map renders correctly on mobile

critical_code_review_comments: Backend haversine_km function correctly calculates distance between coordinates
Backend uses bounding box pre-filter for efficient database queries
Frontend MapPage uses navigator.geolocation API correctly with proper error handling
Frontend FlyToLocation component smoothly animates map to user position
Frontend NearbyPropertyCard component displays distance_km with smart formatting (meters vs km)
React-leaflet Circle and Marker components used for visual radius and user position
data-testid attributes properly added for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test properties around Conakry (lat~9.5, lng~-13.6)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Geolocation 'Voir les biens autour de moi' feature fully implemented and tested. Backend /api/properties/nearby endpoint works with lat/lng/radius_km params. Frontend MapPage shows user position (blue dot), configurable radius circle, and nearby property cards with distance. Note: Playwright testing requires mocked geolocation via page.context.set_geolocation() since browser doesn't have real GPS.
